messages.content:
Can you rewrite the text by placing a semi-related emoji after each word?

"Wow, I can't believe SHiFT gave up SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom for Super Mario Sunshine. I pay to watch you lose at Jellyfish Fields for 5 hours."
Wow 😮, I can't believe SHiFT gave up SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom for Super Mario Sunshine. I pay 💰 to watch you lose 🤦‍♂️ at Jellyfish Fields for 5️⃣ hours.
I want you to insert a random emoji after each word. Emojis must be quasi-related to the word it follows.
Wow 😮, I can't believe 🤯 SHiFT gave up 🆙 SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom for Super Mario Sunshine. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you lose 😫 at Jellyfish Fields for 5️⃣ hours.
More emojis
Wow 😲, I can't believe 🤔 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom for Super Mario Sunshine. I pay 💸 to watch 👀 you lose 😩 at Jellyfish Fields for 5️⃣ hours.
More emojis
Wow 😮, I can't believe 🤯 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom for Super Mario Sunshine. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you lose 😫 at Jellyfish Fields for 5️⃣ hours. 🕐⌛
More emojis
Wow 😱, I can't believe 🤔 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom 🧽 for Super Mario Sunshine ☀️. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you lose 😩 at Jellyfish Fields 🎣 for 5️⃣ hours. ⌛️
More
Wow 😲, I can't believe 🤯 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom 🧽 for Super Mario Sunshine ☀️. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you lose 😔 at Jellyfish Fields 🎣 for 5️⃣ hours. ⏳🕒
More
Wow 😮, I can't believe 🤯 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom 🧽 for Super Mario Sunshine ☀️. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you lose 😩 at Jellyfish Fields 🎣 for 5️⃣ hours. ⏰🌊🔽
More, like a lot more. I said after each world

Wow 😲, I 👁️ can't ❌ believe 🤯 SHiFT gave 🔀 up 🙅‍♂️ SpongeBob 🧽 SquarePants 🟦: Battle 👊 for Bikini 👙 Bottom ⬇️ for Super 🌞 Mario 👾 Sunshine ☀️. I 👁️ pay 💵 to watch 👀 you 👈 lose 😔 at Jellyfish 🎣 Fields 🏞️ for 5️⃣ hours ⌛️. ⌚️🌊🔆🥊🍍🔅🏝️🕑🌌🎢🌟💸
"Wow, I can't believe SHiFT gave up Play for the Teletubbies on the PlayStation 1 for SpongeBob SquarePants: Battle for Bikini Bottom. I pay to watch you spill Tubby Custard for 5 hours."

Wow 😮, I can't believe 🤯 SHiFT gave up 🙅‍♂️ Play 🎮 for the Teletubbies 📺 on the PlayStation 1️⃣ for SpongeBob SquarePants 🟦: Battle 👊 for Bikini 👙 Bottom ⬇️. I pay 💰 to watch 👀 you spill 🌊 Tubby Custard 🍯 for 5️⃣ hours ⌛️. 🕔🎮📺🟢🟦🌊🍯💰
"An excellent protein rich meal, if only termites weren't so irritating."
An excellent 💯 protein 🍗 rich 🤑 meal 🍽️, if only termites 🐜 weren't so irritating 🙄. 🍖🌿🍽️🐜🙄
"It can be hard adapting to such a different and unfamiliar world. Oh dear."
It can be hard 😓 adapting 🔄 to such a different ✨ and unfamiliar 🌍 world 🌎. Oh dear 😣. 🌍✨😣
"It was time for Tubby Custard. Oh dear, what a mess!"
It was time ⏰ for Tubby Custard 🍯. Oh dear 😬, what a mess! 🙈🍯😬
